title: NAYA GENERATIONS - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER NAYA GENERATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intergenerational, cooperative community designed to support families of foster children by promoting permanency, community, and caring relationships, while offering safety and meaningful purpose in the daily lives of older adults. Rental agreement includes 100 hours per quarter of volunteer service to the community. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: -Preference for age 55 and older who have children residing with them, parents of children in foster care who are reuniting with their families, and foster families -Households earning up to 60% of the area’s median income (AMI) Hours: Phone: Monday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm, Tuesday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (503) 719-6751 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 288-8177 Main phone Main phone (503) 719-6751 FAX (971) 888-5011 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to apply for the waitlist FEES: Varies by housing availability DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Foster Families Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Parents of Children in Foster Care Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE -
